description_long: This is a two-story suburban house surrounded by a dense ring of tall evergreen trees and flowering shrubs, creating a secluded and private setting. The house features a combination of white and gray exterior walls, with a prominent dark gray gable roof and multiple rooflines. Large windows are visible on the front and rear facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property includes a garage attached to one side and a spacious outdoor deck or patio area at the back. The landscaping is lush, with a mix of green coniferous trees and vibrant purple and pink flowering bushes, enhancing the visual appeal and privacy. The overall design suggests a modern or contemporary architectural style with clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gable roof, white and gray exterior, large windows, and surrounded by dense evergreen trees and flowering shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, large windows, and a landscaped path framed by tall evergreens and flowering bushes.
description_view_1: Side/rear angled view highlighting the roof structure, backyard area, and the dense tree and shrub border.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, outdoor deck or patio, and the surrounding trees and flowering plants.
description_view_3: Opposite side/rear angled view focusing on the garage side, rooflines, and the thick perimeter of trees and shrubs.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows on front and rear facades
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small porch, and steps, flanked by large windows and integrated into the front facade.
